name: LAMCP Bridge
description: Local HTTP bridge that lets the LAMCP MCP server execute Python inside this Rhino instance. Binds to 127.0.0.1 only — never expose beyond localhost.

inputParameters.name: enable
inputParameters.description: Toggle to start (True) or stop (False) the local HTTP server.

inputParameters.name: port
inputParameters.description: Port to listen on (loopback only). Defaults to 8765.
